subject: An ornate ceremonial lantern or searchlight hanging from a curled wrought-metal pole, its central body shaped like a pendant lamp with carved horn-like flourishes; faint multicolored gem droplets dangle from its base
description: A monochrome, sepia-toned illustration of an elaborate ceremonial searchlight or hanging lamp, rendered in fine-line ink-style detail. The fixture is suspended from an arching wrought-metal pole that curls at its top, with a tassel-like ornament. The lantern body is bell- or bulb-shaped with engraved filigree and twin upward-curving horn-like prongs. Multiple small teardrop-shaped gem ornaments dangle from chains at the base. The background is a flat creamy parchment color, giving the artifact a museum-catalog or guild-emblem feel. No figures are present.
foreground: ornate hanging lantern / searchlight on a curled metal pole with dangling gem droplets
background: flat parchment-cream backdrop, no scene depicted
